data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis — state_conflict): Sprint SKILL.md must initialize a per-story UNCERTAIN counter (e.g., story_uncertain_counts = {}) that persists across batch iterations (like replan_cycle_count). Key by parent story ID, not task ID. Counter must survive the Phase 5 → Phase 3 loop. Also: REPLAN_TRIGGER comment must be written on the epic BEFORE the re-planning invocation so audit trail exists even if re-plan fails.
